ie.updateNote: Citizens should be aware that Malawi is currently experiencing severe fuel shortages. Do not take accessibility of fuel for travel in the country for granted, and plan ahead to ensure that you can reach your planned destination. au.updateNote: Still current at:09 July 2026 Updated:06 March 2026 Latest update:You now need a visa to enter Malawi. Fees apply. Entry and exit conditions can change at short notice (see 'Travel').
